scope: Create the actual 100-agent discovery pilot scaffold after the smoke pass

decision_context.prior_state: The smoke discovery-program run recommended the 100-agent pilot as the next stage, but the repo only had a generic template rather than the actual pilot packet.
decision_context.decision: Add a scaffold builder and generate the real 100-agent pilot intake packet with wedge allocation, per-agent briefs, and scale gates.
decision_context.why_now: The correct next step after the smoke pass is to prepare the real pilot collection surface, not to fabricate a synthetic 100-agent result.

files_expected.purpose: Adds the structured pilot scaffold builder and default cluster allocation.
Stores the real 100-agent pilot scaffold packet.
Explains why the scaffold is the truthful next-stage artifact.

planned_steps: Add a scaffold builder for the next-stage pilot packet
Generate the real 100-agent pilot scaffold under research/meta
Verify the scaffold builder with the focused discovery regression slice

commands: $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m pytest tests/test_mirofish_discovery.py tests/test_watchtower.py tests/test_mirofish_portfolio.py tests/test_trend_prediction.py -q
expected_checks: The scaffold packet contains exactly 100 agent submissions
The cluster allocation totals exactly 100 agents
The regression suite stays green after the scaffold builder is added

guardrails: Do not fabricate a fake 100-agent result packet in place of the real scaffold
Keep the scaffold grounded in the wedges surfaced by the smoke pass
Preserve the 100-agent pilot as the next default stage instead of jumping directly to the full sweep
